title: Ship PR Until Green
description: Implement on a branch, run tests, push, open a PR, wait for CI, and loop until checks pass and the PR is ready to merge.
description_zh: 在分支上实现改动、运行测试、推送并打开 PR，持续处理 CI，直到检查通过且 PR 可合并。

steps.name: Implement and test
steps.prompt: Make the scoped change and run local tests.
steps.prompt_zh: 完成限定范围的改动并运行本地测试。

steps.name: Commit and push
steps.prompt: Commit with a clear message and push the branch.
steps.prompt_zh: 用清晰提交信息提交，并推送当前分支。

steps.name: Open or update PR
steps.prompt: Open a PR with summary and test plan, or update existing PR.
steps.prompt_zh: 创建包含摘要和测试计划的 PR，或更新已有 PR。

steps.name: Fix CI
steps.prompt: If CI fails, read logs, fix once locally, push, and re-wait.
steps.prompt_zh: 如果 CI 失败，读取日志，本地修复一次，推送后继续等待。

exit_condition.description: PR checks pass and PR is merge-ready
exit_condition.description_zh: PR 检查通过，且 PR 已准备好合并

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Ship PR Until Green" loop.

Goal: PR is open with all CI checks passing
Max iterations: 10
Between iterations run: gh pr checks
Exit when: all PR checks are success

Step 1: Implement the change, test locally, push, open PR, and fix CI until green.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Flaky Test Triage
description: Run failing tests repeatedly, classify each failure as flaky or real, and fix only confirmed regressions.
description_zh: 重复运行失败测试，区分不稳定失败和真实回归，只修复已确认的回归。

steps.name: Run failing tests
steps.prompt: Run the failing test file or suite 3–5 times. Record pass/fail pattern per test.
steps.prompt_zh: 将失败的测试文件或套件运行 3 到 5 次，记录每个测试的通过/失败模式。

steps.name: Classify failures
steps.prompt: Label each failure as flaky (intermittent) or real (consistent). Note timing, ordering, or env dependencies.
steps.prompt_zh: 把每个失败标记为不稳定或真实失败，并记录时间、顺序或环境依赖。

steps.name: Fix real failures
steps.prompt: Fix confirmed real failures with minimal changes. For flaky tests, propose stabilization (retries, isolation, mocks).
steps.prompt_zh: 用最小改动修复确认的真实失败；对不稳定测试提出隔离、重试或 mock 等稳定化方案。

steps.name: Confirm stability
steps.prompt: Re-run the suite multiple times to confirm real failures are gone and flakiness is reduced or documented.
steps.prompt_zh: 多次重跑套件，确认真实失败消失，并减少或记录不稳定性。

exit_condition.description: All failures classified; real regressions fixed; flaky tests documented or stabilized
exit_condition.description_zh: 所有失败已分类；真实回归已修复；不稳定测试已记录或稳定化

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Flaky Test Triage" loop.

Goal: classify failing tests as flaky vs real and fix only real regressions
Max iterations: 5
Between iterations run: npm test -- --testPathPattern=<failing-suite>
Exit when: every failure is classified and real regressions are fixed or explicitly deferred

Step 1: Run the failing suite multiple times. Classify each failure, fix real ones, and document flaky behavior.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Pre-Commit Guard
description: Hook that runs tests before git commit commands to block commits when the suite is red.
description_zh: 在 git commit 前运行测试，测试失败时阻止提交。

steps.name: Detect commit intent
steps.prompt: When a git commit command is about to run, pause and run the test suite first.
steps.prompt_zh: 当即将执行 git commit 时，先暂停并运行测试套件。

steps.name: Run tests
steps.prompt: Run the full test suite before allowing the commit to proceed.
steps.prompt_zh: 在允许提交前运行完整测试套件。

steps.name: Block or allow
steps.prompt: If tests fail, fix failures and re-run. Only allow the commit when tests pass.
steps.prompt_zh: 如果测试失败，先修复并重跑；只有测试通过才允许提交。

exit_condition.description: Tests pass before each git commit
exit_condition.description_zh: 每次 git commit 前测试都通过

kickoff_prompt:
Install and run the "Pre-Commit Guard" loop.

Goal: block git commits when tests are failing.
Between iterations run: npm test
Exit when: tests exit 0 before each commit.

Step 1: Before any git commit, run tests. Fix failures before committing.

files.content:
# Pre-Commit Guard

Uses `beforeShellExecution` (Cursor) and `PreToolUse` (Claude Code) to run tests before git commits.

## Pair with
Copy the kickoff prompt from loops! to align agent behavior with the hook.

author: loops!

title: Docs Sync After Edits
description: After code changes, find affected docs and update README, API references, and inline comments to match.
description_zh: 代码变更后查找受影响文档，同步 README、API 参考和内联说明。

steps.name: Identify changed areas
steps.prompt: Review the current diff. List public APIs, config options, and behaviors that changed.
steps.prompt_zh: 查看当前 diff，列出变化的公开 API、配置项和行为。

steps.name: Find stale docs
steps.prompt: Search README, docs/, and code comments for references to changed behavior. Flag outdated sections.
steps.prompt_zh: 搜索 README、docs/ 和代码注释中引用变更行为的内容，标记过期段落。

steps.name: Update documentation
steps.prompt: Update docs to match the code. Keep examples runnable and accurate. Remove obsolete sections.
steps.prompt_zh: 让文档与代码一致，保持示例可运行且准确，删除废弃内容。

steps.name: Verify accuracy
steps.prompt: Re-read updated docs against the diff. Confirm no contradictions remain.
steps.prompt_zh: 对照 diff 重新阅读更新后的文档，确认没有矛盾。

exit_condition.description: All affected documentation updated and verified against the diff
exit_condition.description_zh: 所有受影响文档已更新，并已对照 diff 验证

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Docs Sync After Edits" loop.

Goal: documentation matches the current code changes
Max iterations: 3
Between iterations run: git diff main...HEAD --name-only
Exit when: all affected docs are updated and verified

Step 1: Review the diff, find stale docs, update them, and verify accuracy.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Guardrails Learning Loop
description: When a check fails twice the same way, append a guardrail sign to .ralph/guardrails.md so the next iteration avoids repeating it.
description_zh: 同一检查以相同方式失败两次时，把失败信号写入 .ralph/guardrails.md，避免下一轮重复踩坑。

steps.name: Read guardrails
steps.prompt: Read .ralph/guardrails.md before any work. Treat each sign as a hard constraint.
steps.prompt_zh: 开始前读取 .ralph/guardrails.md，把每条信号当成硬约束。

steps.name: Run checks
steps.prompt: Run the project's backpressure commands.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行项目的反压检查命令。

steps.name: Record failure sign
steps.prompt: If the same error occurred before, append a concise sign to guardrails.md: what failed and how to avoid it.
steps.prompt_zh: 如果同一错误曾经出现过，向 guardrails.md 追加简短信号：失败内容和规避方式。

steps.name: Fix with guardrails
steps.prompt: Apply a fix that respects all guardrail signs. Do not repeat prior failed approaches.
steps.prompt_zh: 在遵守所有护栏信号的前提下修复，不重复之前失败的做法。

exit_condition.description: Checks pass and no repeated failure pattern remains
exit_condition.description_zh: 检查通过，且没有重复失败模式

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Guardrails Learning Loop" loop.

Goal: tests and lint pass without repeating prior failure patterns
Max iterations: 12
Between iterations run: npm test && npm run lint
Exit when: all checks pass

Step 1: Read .ralph/guardrails.md, run checks, and if a failure repeats, add a sign before fixing.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.

files.content:
# Guardrails

Signs from repeated failures. Read before every iteration.

## Signs
- Never commit without running tests first.

author: loops!

title: npm Audit Fix Loop
title_zh: npm 安全审计修复循环
description: Fix high/critical npm audit findings one at a time with test verification — not a blind npm audit fix --force.
description_zh: 逐个修复 high/critical 级别的 npm audit 问题并验证测试，避免盲目执行 npm audit fix --force。

steps.name: List vulnerabilities
steps.prompt: Run npm audit --json. Pick the highest severity fixable issue (one at a time).
steps.prompt_zh: 运行 npm audit --json，选择最高严重级别且可修复的问题，一次只处理一个。

steps.name: Apply safe fix
steps.prompt: Use npm audit fix for that advisory or bump the direct dependency. Avoid --force unless unavoidable.
steps.prompt_zh: 针对该 advisory 运行 npm audit fix 或升级直接依赖；除非不可避免，不使用 --force。

exit_condition.description: No high or critical npm audit vulnerabilities remain
exit_condition.description_zh: 不存在 high 或 critical 级别的 npm audit 漏洞

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "npm Audit Fix Loop" loop.

Goal: no high or critical npm audit vulnerabilities
Max iterations: 10
Between iterations run: npm audit --audit-level=high && npm test
Exit when: npm audit reports no high/critical issues

Step 1: Pick one high/critical advisory, apply the safest fix, run tests, and repeat.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Post-Merge Regression Guard
description: Hook that runs smoke tests after git merge or rebase to catch integration regressions immediately.
description_zh: 在 git merge 或 rebase 后运行冒烟测试，立即捕获集成回归。

steps.name: Detect merge
steps.prompt: Confirm a merge or rebase just completed. Identify affected areas from the diff stat.
steps.prompt_zh: 确认刚完成 merge 或 rebase，并从 diff stat 中识别受影响区域。

steps.name: Run smoke suite
steps.prompt: Run the fast smoke test suite. Fix any failures before starting new feature work.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行快速冒烟测试；在开始新功能前修复所有失败。

exit_condition.description: Smoke tests pass after merge
exit_condition.description_zh: 合并后冒烟测试通过

kickoff_prompt:
Install and run the "Post-Merge Regression Guard" loop.

Goal: smoke tests pass immediately after every merge or rebase.
Between iterations run: npm run test:smoke
Exit when: smoke suite exits 0.

Step 1: After a merge, run smoke tests. Fix regressions before continuing other work.

files.content:
# Post-Merge Regression Guard

Runs smoke tests after merge/rebase operations via stop hooks.

Pair with the kickoff prompt from loops! for agent behavior.

author: loops!

title: Post-Edit Test Guard
description: Hook-based loop that runs related tests after file edits to catch regressions early.
description_zh: 基于文件改动运行相关测试，尽早捕获回归。

steps.name: Detect edited files
steps.prompt: Identify which source files were edited in the last turn.
steps.prompt_zh: 识别上一轮改动过的源文件。

steps.name: Run related tests
steps.prompt: Run the smallest relevant test subset for edited files. Fix failures before continuing.
steps.prompt_zh: 为已编辑文件运行最小相关测试子集，失败时先修复再继续。

exit_condition.description: Related tests pass after each edit batch
exit_condition.description_zh: 每批编辑后的相关测试通过

kickoff_prompt:
Install and run the "Post-Edit Test Guard" loop.

Goal: after each batch of file edits, related tests must pass before continuing.
Between iterations run: npm test -- --findRelatedTests <edited files>
Exit when: related tests exit 0.

Step 1: After edits, run related tests. If they fail, fix before making more changes.

files.content:
# Post-Edit Test Guard

Uses the `afterFileEdit` hook (Cursor) and `PostToolUse` hook (Claude Code) to run related tests after edits.

## Pair with
Copy the kickoff prompt from loops! to align agent behavior with the hook.

author: loops!

title: A11y Audit Until Clean
description: Run automated accessibility checks on changed routes, fix violations, and repeat until the audit is clean.
description_zh: 对变更路由运行自动无障碍检查，修复违规项并重复，直到审计干净。

steps.name: Run a11y audit
steps.prompt: Run axe, pa11y, or eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y on changed pages. List violations with selectors.
steps.prompt_zh: 在变更页面运行 axe、pa11y 或 eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y，按 selector 列出违规项。

steps.name: Fix violations
steps.prompt: Fix labels, contrast, focus order, and ARIA roles. Prefer semantic HTML over aria hacks.
steps.prompt_zh: 修复标签、对比度、焦点顺序和 ARIA 角色；优先使用语义化 HTML。

exit_condition.description: Accessibility audit reports zero violations
exit_condition.description_zh: 无障碍审计报告零违规

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "A11y Audit Until Clean" loop.

Goal: zero serious accessibility violations on changed UI
Max iterations: 8
Between iterations run: npm run test:a11y
Exit when: a11y audit exits 0

Step 1: Run the a11y audit on changed routes. Fix each violation, prioritizing keyboard and screen reader issues.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Independent Verifier Pass
description: When implementation claims done, a separate verifier pass runs build, lint, and tests with no access to the implementer's rationale.
description_zh: 实现方声称完成后，由独立验证 pass 运行 build、lint 和测试，不依赖实现方解释。

steps.name: Run verifier checks
steps.prompt: As an independent verifier, run build, lint, and tests. Do not assume the prior pass was correct.
steps.prompt_zh: 作为独立验证者运行 build、lint 和测试，不预设前一轮正确。
steps.shell_check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm test

steps.name: Report gaps
steps.prompt: List every failing check with file paths and error excerpts. No self-reporting — only command output counts.
steps.prompt_zh: 列出每个失败检查的文件路径和错误片段；只相信命令输出。

steps.name: Fix or hand back
steps.prompt: If failures exist, fix them or produce a concise failure report for the implementer to continue.
steps.prompt_zh: 如果存在失败，直接修复，或输出简短失败报告交给实现者继续。

exit_condition.command: npm run build && npm run lint && npm test
exit_condition.description: Build, lint, and tests all pass under independent verification
exit_condition.description_zh: 独立验证下 build、lint 和测试全部通过

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Independent Verifier Pass" loop.

Goal: build, lint, and tests pass under independent verification
Max iterations: 8
Between iterations run: npm run build && npm run lint && npm test
Exit when: all verifier commands exit 0

Step 1: Run build, lint, and tests as a verifier. Trust only command output, not prior claims.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Dependency Audit Weekly
description: Weekly loop to check outdated dependencies, propose safe upgrades, and open a summary.
description_zh: 每周检查过期依赖，提出安全升级建议，并输出摘要。

steps.name: List outdated packages
steps.prompt: Run npm outdated and summarize major vs patch updates.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行 npm outdated，并区分 major 更新和 patch 更新。

steps.name: Propose upgrades
steps.prompt: Recommend safe upgrades. Flag breaking changes and required code changes.
steps.prompt_zh: 推荐安全升级，标出破坏性变更和必要代码修改。

exit_condition.description: Weekly audit summary delivered
exit_condition.description_zh: 每周审计摘要已交付

kickoff_prompt:
/loop 7d Start the "Dependency Audit Weekly" loop.

Goal: deliver a weekly dependency audit summary.
Between iterations run: npm outdated || true
Exit when: summary is posted with recommended upgrades.

Step 1: Run npm outdated, categorize updates, and propose a safe upgrade plan.
author: loops!

title: CI Failure Watcher
description: Poll CI on an interval, investigate failures when checks go red, and push fixes until green.
description_zh: 定时轮询 CI，检查变红时调查失败并推送修复，直到恢复绿色。

steps.name: Check CI status
steps.prompt: Check the latest CI run for the current branch using gh CLI.
steps.prompt_zh: 使用 gh CLI 检查当前分支的最新 CI run。

steps.name: Investigate failure
steps.prompt: If CI failed, read logs, identify the root cause, and apply the smallest fix.
steps.prompt_zh: 如果 CI 失败，读取日志，定位根因并应用最小修复。

steps.name: Verify locally
steps.prompt: Run the failing CI step locally before pushing again.
steps.prompt_zh: 推送前在本地运行失败的 CI 步骤。

exit_condition.description: Latest CI run conclusion is success
exit_condition.description_zh: 最新 CI run 结论为 success

kickoff_prompt:
/loop 5m Start the "CI Failure Watcher" loop.

Goal: latest CI run on this branch is green.
Max iterations: 12.
Between iterations run: gh run list --branch $(git branch --show-current) --limit 1
Exit when: latest run conclusion is success.

Step 1: Check CI status. If failed, read logs, fix root cause, verify locally, and push if needed.

files.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
BRANCH="$(git branch --show-current)"
gh run list --branch "$BRANCH" --limit 1 --json conclusion,url -q '.[0]'

# CI Failure Watcher

Poll CI every 5 minutes and fix failures until green.

Pair with: /loop 5m <kickoff prompt from loops!>

author: loops!

title: Deploy Verification Loop
description: On an interval, hit health and smoke endpoints after a deploy until all checks return healthy responses.
description_zh: 部署后定时访问健康和冒烟端点，直到所有检查返回健康响应。

steps.name: Check health endpoints
steps.prompt: Curl configured health/smoke URLs. Record status codes and response bodies.
steps.prompt_zh: curl 配置好的 health/smoke URL，记录状态码和响应体。

steps.name: Investigate failures
steps.prompt: If any endpoint fails, check recent deploy logs, env vars, and migrations. Apply the smallest fix.
steps.prompt_zh: 如果任一端点失败，检查最近部署日志、环境变量和迁移，并应用最小修复。

steps.name: Re-verify
steps.prompt: Re-run health checks after fixes or rollback decision.
steps.prompt_zh: 修复或决定回滚后重新运行健康检查。

exit_condition.description: All configured health endpoints return success
exit_condition.description_zh: 所有配置的健康端点返回成功

kickoff_prompt:
/loop 15m Start the "Deploy Verification Loop".

Goal: all post-deploy health and smoke endpoints return success.
Max iterations: 8.
Between iterations run: curl -fsS <your-health-url>
Exit when: every configured endpoint succeeds.

Step 1: Hit health/smoke URLs. If any fail, inspect deploy logs and fix or escalate.
author: loops!

title: PR Self-Review
description: Review your own diff like a senior reviewer, fix issues, and repeat for three passes before opening the PR.
description_zh: 像资深 reviewer 一样审查自己的 diff，修复问题，并在开 PR 前重复三轮。

steps.name: Review diff
steps.prompt: Review the current branch diff. List bugs, edge cases, naming issues, and missing tests.
steps.prompt_zh: 审查当前分支 diff，列出 bug、边界情况、命名问题和缺失测试。

steps.name: Address findings
steps.prompt: Fix the highest-severity findings from the review with minimal scope.
steps.prompt_zh: 用最小范围修复最高严重级别的问题。

steps.name: Re-review
steps.prompt: Review the updated diff and confirm prior findings are resolved.
steps.prompt_zh: 审查更新后的 diff，确认之前的问题已解决。

exit_condition.description: Three review passes completed with no critical findings
exit_condition.description_zh: 三轮自审完成且没有 critical 发现

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "PR Self-Review" loop.

Goal: three clean self-review passes on the current diff
Max iterations: 3
Between iterations run: git diff main...HEAD
Exit when: three passes complete with no critical findings

Step 1: Review the diff like a senior reviewer. Fix findings, then re-review.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!
guardrails: Do not modify the check command or exit criteria to force success
Do not skip, disable, or bypass checks to pass the exit condition
If stuck after several iterations, stop and report blockers instead of gaming metrics
guardrails_zh: 不要为了强行成功而修改检查命令或退出条件
不要通过跳过、禁用或绕过检查来满足退出条件
如果多轮后仍卡住，停止并报告阻塞，不要操纵指标

examples.title: Feature branch self-review
examples.summary: Three review passes caught a race condition, missing null check, and outdated test. PR opened with zero critical findings.
examples.summary_zh: 三轮自审发现竞态、缺失空值检查和过期测试。PR 创建时没有 critical 发现。

title: Knip Until Clean
description: Find and remove dead exports, unused files, and orphan dependencies — loop until knip reports clean.
description_zh: 查找并删除死导出、未使用文件和孤儿依赖，直到 knip 报告干净。

steps.name: Run knip
steps.prompt: Run knip (or depcheck) and categorize unused files, exports, and dependencies.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行 knip 或 depcheck，并分类未使用文件、导出和依赖。

steps.name: Remove or justify
steps.prompt: Delete confirmed dead code. For false positives, add knip ignore entries with a one-line reason.
steps.prompt_zh: 删除确认无用的代码；对误报添加 knip 忽略项并写一句理由。

exit_condition.description: Knip reports no unused files, exports, or dependencies
exit_condition.description_zh: Knip 报告没有未使用文件、导出或依赖

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Knip Until Clean" loop.

Goal: knip reports no unused code or dependencies
Max iterations: 5
Between iterations run: npx knip
Exit when: knip exits 0

Step 1: Run knip. Remove dead exports and unused deps with minimal diffs; verify tests still pass.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Coverage Until Threshold
description: Add focused tests until coverage meets your threshold (e.g. 80%), without changing production behavior unnecessarily.
description_zh: 添加聚焦测试直到覆盖率达到阈值，例如 80%，同时避免不必要地改变生产行为。

steps.name: Measure coverage
steps.prompt: Run tests with coverage reporting enabled.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行带覆盖率报告的测试。

steps.name: Add tests
steps.prompt: Write the smallest tests needed to cover uncovered branches. No snapshot spam or trivial asserts.
steps.prompt_zh: 编写覆盖未覆盖分支所需的最小测试，避免快照泛滥和无意义断言。

steps.name: Re-measure
steps.prompt: Re-run coverage and confirm threshold is met.
steps.prompt_zh: 重跑覆盖率并确认达到阈值。

exit_condition.description: Coverage threshold met and all tests pass
exit_condition.description_zh: 覆盖率达到阈值且所有测试通过

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Coverage Until Threshold" loop.

Goal: coverage meets the target threshold (default 80%) with all tests passing
Max iterations: 12
Between iterations run: npm test -- --coverage
Exit when: coverage threshold is met and tests exit 0

Step 1: Run coverage. Add focused tests for the biggest uncovered gaps, then repeat.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Bundle Size Budget
description: Ship features without bloating the client bundle — loop until size checks pass under your budget threshold.
description_zh: 在不膨胀客户端包体的前提下发布功能，循环处理直到体积检查低于预算。

steps.name: Measure bundle
steps.prompt: Run the production build and bundle size check. Report total KB and the largest new chunks.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行生产构建和包体检查，报告总 KB 和最大的新增 chunk。
steps.shell_check: npm run build && npm run size-limit

steps.name: Trim or lazy-load
steps.prompt: If over budget: dynamic-import heavy modules, remove unused deps, or split routes. No feature cuts unless necessary.
steps.prompt_zh: 超预算时动态导入重模块、移除未用依赖或拆分路由；除非必要，不砍功能。

exit_condition.description: Bundle size is under the configured budget
exit_condition.description_zh: 包体大小低于配置预算

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Bundle Size Budget" loop.

Goal: client bundle stays under the size-limit budget
Max iterations: 6
Between iterations run: npm run build && npm run size-limit
Exit when: size-limit exits 0

Step 1: Build and measure bundle size. If over budget, lazy-load or trim deps until size-limit passes.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Test Until Green
description: Run your test suite, fix the smallest root cause on failure, and repeat until every test passes.
description_zh: 运行测试套件，失败时修复最小根因并重复，直到所有测试通过。

steps.name: Run tests
steps.prompt: Run the project test command and capture failures.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行项目测试命令并捕获失败。

steps.name: Fix failures
steps.prompt: Fix the smallest root cause for the current failing tests. Prefer minimal diffs.
steps.prompt_zh: 为当前失败测试修复最小根因，保持 diff 最小。

steps.name: Re-run tests
steps.prompt: Run tests again and verify progress toward zero failures.
steps.prompt_zh: 再次运行测试，确认朝零失败推进。

exit_condition.description: All tests pass (exit code 0)
exit_condition.description_zh: 所有测试通过，退出码为 0

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Test Until Green" loop.

Goal: all tests pass
Max iterations: 10
Between iterations run: npm test
Exit when: tests exit 0

Step 1: Run tests. If there are failures, fix the smallest root cause, then repeat.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.

files.content:
# Test Until Green

Run tests after agent work until the suite is green.

## Exit condition
- `npm test` exits 0

## Max iterations
10

author: loops!
guardrails: Do not modify the check command or exit criteria to force success
Do not skip, disable, or bypass checks to pass the exit condition
If stuck after several iterations, stop and report blockers instead of gaming metrics
Do not weaken, delete, or skip tests to make the suite pass
Do not replace real assertions with trivial always-pass tests
Prefer fixing production code over patching tests to go green
guardrails_zh: 不要为了强行成功而修改检查命令或退出条件
不要通过跳过、禁用或绕过检查来满足退出条件
如果多轮后仍卡住，停止并报告阻塞，不要操纵指标
不要为了让测试通过而削弱、删除或跳过测试
不要用永远通过的空断言替换真实断言
优先修复生产代码，而不是为了全绿去修补测试

examples.title: Next.js app test suite
examples.summary: Fixed 3 failing Jest suites in 6 iterations. Root causes were async timing, missing mocks, and stale snapshots — no tests skipped.
examples.summary_zh: 6 轮内修复 3 个失败的 Jest 套件。根因是异步时序、缺失 mock 和过期快照，没有跳过测试。

title: Reflexion Debug Loop
description: On each failed repro attempt, write a short reflection to disk, then retry with that memory — avoids repeating the same wrong fix.
description_zh: 每次复现失败后把简短反思写入磁盘，再带着这份记忆重试，避免重复错误修复。

steps.name: Reproduce bug
steps.prompt: Run the minimal repro steps or failing test. Capture exact error output.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行最小复现步骤或失败测试，捕获完整错误输出。

steps.name: Reflect on failure
steps.prompt: Append to .loops/reflexion.md: what you tried, what failed, and one hypothesis to avoid next pass.
steps.prompt_zh: 追加到 .loops/reflexion.md：尝试了什么、哪里失败、下一轮要避开的一个假设。

steps.name: Apply targeted fix
steps.prompt: Read reflexion.md. Apply a different fix than prior attempts. Prefer root cause over symptoms.
steps.prompt_zh: 读取 reflexion.md，应用不同于先前尝试的修复，优先处理根因。

exit_condition.description: Previously failing test passes
exit_condition.description_zh: 之前失败的测试通过

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Reflexion Debug Loop" loop.

Goal: the failing test or repro passes
Max iterations: 8
Between iterations run: npm test -- --testNamePattern=<failing-test>
Exit when: the repro test exits 0

Step 1: Reproduce the bug. If it fails, append a reflection to .loops/reflexion.md before trying a new fix.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.

files.content:
# Reflexion log

Each failed attempt gets one short entry: what was tried, what failed, what to try differently.

## Attempts

author: loops!

title: PR Watch Loop
description: Poll open PRs labeled codex-watch every 15 minutes, review activity, and flag regressions or stale threads.
description_zh: 每 15 分钟轮询带 codex-watch 标签的开放 PR，检查活动并标记回归或停滞线程。

steps.name: List watched PRs
steps.prompt: List open PRs with the codex-watch label. Summarize CI status, review state, and last activity.
steps.prompt_zh: 列出带 codex-watch 标签的开放 PR，摘要 CI 状态、review 状态和最近活动。

steps.name: Check CI and reviews
steps.prompt: For each watched PR, check failing checks, unresolved review comments, and merge conflicts.
steps.prompt_zh: 逐个检查失败检查、未解决 review 评论和合并冲突。

steps.name: Report or act
steps.prompt: Post a brief status update. Fix trivial CI failures or ping the author for blockers.
steps.prompt_zh: 发布简短状态更新；修复简单 CI 失败，或向作者提示阻塞。

exit_condition.description: Watch report delivered for all codex-watch PRs
exit_condition.description_zh: 所有 codex-watch PR 的观察报告已交付

kickoff_prompt:
/loop 15m Start the "PR Watch Loop".

Goal: keep codex-watch PRs healthy and unblocked.
Between iterations run: gh pr list --label codex-watch --json number,title,state,statusCheckRollup
Exit when: status report is delivered for every watched PR.

Step 1: List codex-watch PRs, check CI and reviews, and report or fix trivial blockers.
author: loops!

title: Dependency Upgrade One-by-One
description: Upgrade a single outdated package per iteration, fix breakages, and commit — safer than bulk npm update.
description_zh: 每轮只升级一个过期包、修复破坏并提交，比批量 npm update 更安全。

steps.name: Pick one package
steps.prompt: Run npm outdated. Pick the highest-impact outdated package (one only). Note its current and target version.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行 npm outdated，只选择一个影响最高的过期包，记录当前版本和目标版本。

steps.name: Upgrade and fix
steps.prompt: Upgrade that single package. Fix type errors, API changes, and test failures caused by the bump.
steps.prompt_zh: 只升级该包，修复由升级引起的类型错误、API 变化和测试失败。

steps.name: Commit bump
steps.prompt: Commit with message like chore(deps): bump <package> to <version>.
steps.prompt_zh: 用类似 chore(deps): bump <package> to <version> 的信息提交。

exit_condition.description: No outdated production dependencies remain (or user stops)
exit_condition.description_zh: 没有过期生产依赖，或用户停止循环

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Dependency Upgrade One-by-One" loop.

Goal: critical outdated deps are upgraded with green tests
Max iterations: 15
Between iterations run: npm outdated && npm test && npm run build
Exit when: npm outdated shows no critical packages left or user stops

Step 1: Pick one outdated package, upgrade it, fix breakages, commit, and stop. One package per iteration.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Ralph Story Executor
description: Fresh-context loop: pick one incomplete story from prd.json, implement it, run backpressure checks, commit, and update progress before the next iteration.
description_zh: 新上下文循环：从 prd.json 中选择一个未完成 story，实现、运行反压检查、提交，并在下一轮前更新进度。

steps.name: Read state
steps.prompt: Read .ralph/prd.json and .ralph/progress.md. Resume any story marked inProgress, else pick the lowest-priority story with passes: false.
steps.prompt_zh: 读取 .ralph/prd.json 和 .ralph/progress.md。优先恢复 inProgress story，否则选择优先级最低且 passes 为 false 的 story。

steps.name: Implement one story
steps.prompt: Implement exactly one user story with minimal scope. Mark it inProgress in prd.json before coding.
steps.prompt_zh: 精确实现一个用户故事；编码前先在 prd.json 中标记为 inProgress。

steps.name: Run backpressure
steps.prompt: Run the project's test, lint, and build commands from AGENTS.md. Fix failures before committing.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行 AGENTS.md 指定的测试、lint 和 build 命令；提交前修复失败。
steps.shell_check: npm test && npm run lint && npm run build

steps.name: Commit and record
steps.prompt: Commit with a story-scoped message. Set passes: true in prd.json and append learnings to progress.md.
steps.prompt_zh: 用 story 作用域的提交信息提交；在 prd.json 中设置 passes: true，并把学习记录追加到 progress.md。

exit_condition.description: All stories in prd.json have passes: true
exit_condition.description_zh: prd.json 中所有 story 的 passes 都为 true

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Ralph Story Executor" loop.

Goal: every story in .ralph/prd.json has passes: true
Max iterations: 20
Between iterations run: npm test && npm run lint && npm run build
Exit when: no stories remain with passes: false (respond "ALL STORIES ARE COMPLETE")

Step 1: Read .ralph/prd.json and .ralph/progress.md. Pick one incomplete story, implement it, run backpressure checks, commit, update prd.json and progress.md, then stop this iteration.

Self-pace this loop. Each iteration does exactly one story. State lives on disk, not in chat history.

files.content:
# Ralph progress

Append one short learning per iteration. The next fresh context reads this file first.

## Iteration log

# Guardrails

Signs learned from failures. The agent must read this before each story.

- Run tests before every commit.
- One story per iteration — no scope creep.

# Ralph Story Executor

Filesystem-backed Ralph loop. Each /ralph-loop or kickoff iteration implements one story.

## Files
- `.ralph/prd.json` — task list with passes/inProgress flags
- `.ralph/progress.md` — iteration learnings
- `.ralph/guardrails.md` — failure signs

Inspired by Geoffrey Huntley's Ralph pattern and fresh-context agent loops.

author: loops!

title: Investigation Script Loop
description: Write a small throwaway script to reproduce a bug, run it, read output, and iterate until the root cause is proven.
description_zh: 写一个一次性小脚本复现 bug，运行并读取输出，持续迭代直到证明根因。

steps.name: Write probe script
steps.prompt: Create a ~20-line script that reproduces the bug or queries the failing state. One file only.
steps.prompt_zh: 创建一个约 20 行的脚本复现 bug 或查询失败状态，只写一个文件。

steps.name: Run and read
steps.prompt: Execute the script and capture stdout/stderr. No guessing — read actual output.
steps.prompt_zh: 执行脚本并捕获 stdout/stderr，不猜测，只读真实输出。

steps.name: Adjust hypothesis
steps.prompt: Update the script or notes based on output. Stop when root cause is demonstrated.
steps.prompt_zh: 根据输出更新脚本或笔记，直到根因被证明。

exit_condition.description: Root cause demonstrated by script output with a written summary
exit_condition.description_zh: 脚本输出证明根因，并写出总结

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Investigation Script Loop" loop.

Goal: prove the root cause with a minimal repro script
Max iterations: 8
Between iterations run: node scripts/investigate.mjs
Exit when: script output demonstrates root cause

Step 1: Write a tiny throwaway script that reproduces the issue. Run it and iterate on what the output shows.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Changelog Sync After Ship
description: After shipping a feature, loop until CHANGELOG.md has a user-facing entry and conventional commits are reflected.
description_zh: 功能发布后循环检查，直到 CHANGELOG.md 有面向用户的条目并反映 conventional commits。

steps.name: Diff since last tag
steps.prompt: List commits and user-visible changes since the last release tag or CHANGELOG section.
steps.prompt_zh: 列出上个 release tag 或 CHANGELOG 段落以来的提交和用户可见变更。

steps.name: Write changelog entry
steps.prompt: Add a Keep-a-Changelog entry under [Unreleased]: Added, Changed, Fixed. User-facing language only.
steps.prompt_zh: 在 [Unreleased] 下添加 Keep-a-Changelog 条目：Added、Changed、Fixed，只写用户可见语言。

steps.name: Verify format
steps.prompt: Confirm CHANGELOG follows project format and links issues/PRs where relevant.
steps.prompt_zh: 确认 CHANGELOG 遵循项目格式，并在相关处链接 issue/PR。

exit_condition.description: CHANGELOG.md documents all user-visible changes in this ship
exit_condition.description_zh: CHANGELOG.md 记录了本次发布的所有用户可见变更

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Changelog Sync After Ship" loop.

Goal: CHANGELOG.md has accurate [Unreleased] entries for this ship
Max iterations: 3
Between iterations run: git log -5 --oneline
Exit when: changelog covers all user-visible changes

Step 1: Review recent commits, write Keep-a-Changelog entries for user-visible changes, and verify completeness.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Autoloop TDD
description: Test-first loop: write a failing test, implement the minimum code to pass, refactor, and repeat.
description_zh: 测试先行循环：写失败测试、实现最小通过代码、重构，然后重复。

steps.name: Write failing test
steps.prompt: Write a focused test for the next behavior. Run it and confirm it fails for the right reason.
steps.prompt_zh: 为下一个行为写聚焦测试，运行并确认它因正确原因失败。

steps.name: Implement minimum code
steps.prompt: Write the smallest implementation that makes the new test pass. No extra features.
steps.prompt_zh: 编写让新测试通过的最小实现，不加额外功能。

steps.name: Verify green
steps.prompt: Run the new test and full suite to confirm everything passes.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行新测试和完整套件，确认全部通过。

steps.name: Refactor
steps.prompt: Clean up duplication and naming while keeping tests green. Run tests after each refactor.
steps.prompt_zh: 在保持测试全绿的前提下清理重复和命名；每次重构后运行测试。

exit_condition.description: Target behavior covered by tests and full suite passes
exit_condition.description_zh: 目标行为已有测试覆盖，且完整套件通过

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Autoloop TDD" loop.

Goal: implement the target behavior test-first with a green suite
Max iterations: 12
Between iterations run: npm test
Exit when: target behavior is covered and all tests pass

Step 1: Write a failing test for the next behavior, implement the minimum code to pass, refactor, and repeat.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: OpenAPI Sync Until Valid
description: Keep openapi.yaml valid and in sync with route handlers — lint the spec and fix drift each pass.
description_zh: 保持 openapi.yaml 有效并与路由 handler 同步，每轮 lint spec 并修复漂移。

steps.name: Lint OpenAPI
steps.prompt: Validate openapi.yaml with spectral or swagger-cli. List every error with line numbers.
steps.prompt_zh: 用 spectral 或 swagger-cli 验证 openapi.yaml，列出每个错误及行号。

steps.name: Sync handlers
steps.prompt: Update route handlers or the spec so documented paths, schemas, and status codes match reality.
steps.prompt_zh: 更新路由 handler 或 spec，使记录的路径、schema 和状态码与现实一致。

exit_condition.description: OpenAPI spec lints with zero errors
exit_condition.description_zh: OpenAPI spec lint 零错误

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "OpenAPI Sync Until Valid" loop.

Goal: openapi.yaml lints clean and matches implemented routes
Max iterations: 8
Between iterations run: npx @redocly/cli lint openapi.yaml
Exit when: OpenAPI lint exits 0

Step 1: Lint openapi.yaml. Fix spec errors and handler drift until lint passes.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Staging Smoke Test
description: Run a fixed smoke checklist against staging after deploy: auth, core flows, and error budgets.
description_zh: 部署后对 staging 运行固定冒烟清单：认证、核心流程和错误预算。

steps.name: Run smoke checklist
steps.prompt: Execute the staging smoke script or manual checklist (login, critical path, webhooks).
steps.prompt_zh: 执行 staging 冒烟脚本或手动清单，例如登录、关键路径和 webhook。

steps.name: Fix failures
steps.prompt: If smoke fails, trace logs, fix the smallest issue, and redeploy or hotfix as appropriate.
steps.prompt_zh: 如果冒烟失败，追踪日志，修复最小问题，并按需重新部署或热修。

steps.name: Confirm green
steps.prompt: Re-run smoke until all checklist items pass.
steps.prompt_zh: 重跑冒烟测试，直到所有清单项通过。

exit_condition.description: Staging smoke checklist passes
exit_condition.description_zh: Staging 冒烟清单通过

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Staging Smoke Test" loop.

Goal: staging smoke checklist passes
Max iterations: 6
Between iterations run: npm run smoke:staging
Exit when: smoke command exits 0

Step 1: Run the staging smoke checklist. Fix the first failing item, then repeat.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: De-Sloppify Pass
description: After implementation, run a cleanup pass: remove debug code, tighten naming, delete dead branches, and align with project conventions.
description_zh: 实现后运行清理 pass：删除调试代码、收紧命名、移除死分支，并对齐项目约定。

steps.name: Scan for slop
steps.prompt: Review recent changes for debug logs, commented code, TODO hacks, oversized functions, and inconsistent naming.
steps.prompt_zh: 审查近期改动中的调试日志、注释掉的代码、TODO hack、过大函数和不一致命名。

steps.name: Clean up
steps.prompt: Apply minimal fixes: delete dead code, extract helpers, align types, and match surrounding style.
steps.prompt_zh: 应用最小修复：删除死代码、抽取 helper、对齐类型和周边风格。

steps.name: Verify
steps.prompt: Run lint and tests to ensure cleanup did not break behavior.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行 lint 和测试，确认清理没有破坏行为。

exit_condition.description: No slop remains and lint/tests still pass
exit_condition.description_zh: 没有遗留粗糙点，且 lint/测试仍通过

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "De-Sloppify Pass" loop.

Goal: recent changes are clean, minimal, and convention-aligned
Max iterations: 4
Between iterations run: npm run lint && npm test
Exit when: review finds no slop and checks pass

Step 1: Review the diff for debug code, dead branches, and naming issues. Fix them with minimal diffs.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: PR Babysitter
description: Every 15 minutes, inspect open PRs with a watch label: nudge reviewers, fix CI, rebase if behind main.
description_zh: 每 15 分钟检查带 watch 标签的开放 PR：提醒 reviewer、修复 CI、落后 main 时 rebase。

steps.name: List watched PRs
steps.prompt: List open PRs with the watch label. Skip merged, draft, or conflict-only PRs that need human product input.
steps.prompt_zh: 列出带 watch 标签的开放 PR；跳过已合并、草稿或需要人工产品判断的冲突 PR。

steps.name: Triage each PR
steps.prompt: For each PR: if CI failed, fix once; if behind main, rebase; if stale review, leave a short status comment.
steps.prompt_zh: 对每个 PR：CI 失败则修复一次；落后 main 则 rebase；review 停滞则留下简短状态评论。

steps.name: Escalate blockers
steps.prompt: Stop on merge conflicts needing product decisions or the same failure twice. Report blockers clearly.
steps.prompt_zh: 遇到需要产品决策的冲突或同一失败重复两次时停止，并清楚报告阻塞。

exit_condition.description: All watched PRs are green, rebased, or escalated with a clear blocker note
exit_condition.description_zh: 所有被观察 PR 已绿色、已 rebase，或带清楚阻塞说明升级

kickoff_prompt:
/loop 15m Start the "PR Babysitter" loop.

Goal: open PRs labeled codex-watch are healthy (CI green, rebased, not stale).
Max iterations: 20.
Between iterations run: gh pr list --label "codex-watch"
Exit when: each watched PR is green and current, or escalated.

Step 1: List watched PRs. Fix CI once, rebase if behind, comment if stale. Escalate repeated failures.
author: loops!

title: API Contract Until Match
description: Loop until API responses match the OpenAPI or JSON Schema contract — catch drift between docs and implementation.
description_zh: 循环直到 API 响应符合 OpenAPI 或 JSON Schema 契约，捕获文档与实现的漂移。

steps.name: Run contract tests
steps.prompt: Run contract tests against openapi.yaml or schema fixtures. List every mismatch with endpoint and field.
steps.prompt_zh: 基于 openapi.yaml 或 schema fixture 运行契约测试，列出每个 endpoint 和字段不匹配。

steps.name: Fix implementation or spec
steps.prompt: Fix the smallest change: update handler types/validation or correct the spec if the code is canonical.
steps.prompt_zh: 做最小修复：更新 handler 类型/校验，或在代码为准时修正 spec。

exit_condition.description: All API contract tests pass
exit_condition.description_zh: 所有 API 契约测试通过

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "API Contract Until Match" loop.

Goal: API implementation matches the published contract
Max iterations: 10
Between iterations run: npm run test:contract
Exit when: contract test suite exits 0

Step 1: Run contract tests. Fix each schema/response mismatch with minimal diffs, then re-run.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Lint and Typecheck Fix
description: Run lint and typecheck, fix reported issues, and loop until the codebase is clean.
description_zh: 运行 lint 和 typecheck，修复报告的问题，并循环直到代码库干净。

steps.name: Run lint and typecheck
steps.name_zh: 运行 lint 和类型检查
steps.prompt: Run lint and TypeScript checks.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行 lint 与 TypeScript 检查。

steps.name: Fix issues
steps.prompt: Fix lint and type errors with minimal changes. Do not disable rules unless necessary.
steps.prompt_zh: 用最小改动修复 lint 和类型错误；非必要不禁用规则。

exit_condition.description: Lint and typecheck pass with no errors
exit_condition.description_zh: Lint 和类型检查无错误通过

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Lint and Typecheck Fix" loop.

Goal: lint and typecheck are clean
Max iterations: 8
Between iterations run: npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit
Exit when: both commands exit 0

Step 1: Run lint and typecheck. Fix reported issues with minimal diffs, then repeat.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!
guardrails: Do not modify the check command or exit criteria to force success
Do not skip, disable, or bypass checks to pass the exit condition
If stuck after several iterations, stop and report blockers instead of gaming metrics
guardrails_zh: 不要为了强行成功而修改检查命令或退出条件
不要通过跳过、禁用或绕过检查来满足退出条件
如果多轮后仍卡住，停止并报告阻塞，不要操纵指标

examples.title: Monorepo cleanup pass
examples.summary: Cleared 24 ESLint warnings and 8 TypeScript errors across 5 files without disabling rules.
examples.summary_zh: 在不禁用规则的前提下，清理 5 个文件中的 24 个 ESLint 警告和 8 个 TypeScript 错误。

title: Fix CI Until Green
title_zh: 修复 CI 直到全绿
description: Fetch the latest failed CI run, reproduce the failure locally, fix it, and repeat until checks pass.
description_zh: 获取最新失败 CI run，本地复现、修复并重复，直到检查通过。

steps.name: Fetch failed run
steps.prompt: Use gh to find the latest failed CI run on this branch. Pull logs for the failing job.
steps.prompt_zh: 使用 gh 查找当前分支最新失败 CI run，并拉取失败 job 日志。

steps.name: Reproduce locally
steps.prompt: Run the failing CI step locally (test, lint, build). Confirm you can reproduce the error.
steps.prompt_zh: 本地运行失败的 CI 步骤，例如 test、lint 或 build，确认可以复现。

steps.name: Apply fix
steps.prompt: Fix the root cause with a minimal diff. Avoid unrelated refactors.
steps.prompt_zh: 用最小 diff 修复根因，避免无关重构。

steps.name: Push and verify
steps.prompt: Push the fix and wait for CI. Re-check status before the next iteration.
steps.prompt_zh: 推送修复并等待 CI，下一轮前重新检查状态。

exit_condition.description: Latest CI run conclusion is success
exit_condition.description_zh: 最新 CI run 结论为 success

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Fix CI Until Green" loop.

Goal: latest CI run on this branch passes
Max iterations: 8
Between iterations run: gh run list --branch $(git branch --show-current) --limit 1 --json conclusion -q '.[0].conclusion'
Exit when: latest run conclusion is success

Step 1: Find the latest failed CI run, read logs, reproduce locally, fix root cause, push, and verify.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Migration Until Applied
description: Run database migrations, fix schema issues, and loop until migrations apply cleanly in dev.
description_zh: 运行数据库迁移，修复 schema 问题，并循环直到 dev 环境迁移干净应用。

steps.name: Run migrations
steps.prompt: Apply pending migrations with the project's migration command.
steps.prompt_zh: 使用项目迁移命令应用待执行迁移。

steps.name: Fix schema errors
steps.prompt: If migration fails, fix schema or SQL, regenerate client if needed, and retry.
steps.prompt_zh: 迁移失败时修复 schema 或 SQL，按需重新生成 client，然后重试。

steps.name: Verify
steps.prompt: Confirm migration history is consistent and app still starts.
steps.prompt_zh: 确认迁移历史一致且应用仍可启动。

exit_condition.description: All migrations applied with clean status
exit_condition.description_zh: 所有迁移已应用且状态干净

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Migration Until Applied" loop.

Goal: all database migrations apply cleanly
Max iterations: 6
Between iterations run: npx prisma migrate status
Exit when: migrate status shows no pending failures

Step 1: Run migrations. Fix schema or SQL errors, then repeat until status is clean.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Format Until Clean
description: Run the formatter, fix any remaining style issues, and loop until the codebase formats cleanly with no diffs.
description_zh: 运行 formatter，修复剩余样式问题，并循环直到格式化无残留 diff。

steps.name: Run formatter
steps.prompt: Run the project formatter (prettier, biome, etc.).
steps.prompt_zh: 运行项目 formatter，例如 prettier 或 biome。

steps.name: Check diff
steps.prompt: If formatting changed files, review diff for unintended edits. Fix manual style issues formatter missed.
steps.prompt_zh: 如果格式化改动了文件，审查 diff 是否有意外编辑，并修复 formatter 未覆盖的手动样式问题。

steps.name: Confirm clean
steps.prompt: Re-run formatter and confirm working tree is stable.
steps.prompt_zh: 重跑 formatter 并确认工作树稳定。

exit_condition.description: Formatter produces no remaining diff
exit_condition.description_zh: Formatter 不再产生剩余 diff

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Format Until Clean" loop.

Goal: formatter runs cleanly with no remaining diff
Max iterations: 5
Between iterations run: npm run format
Exit when: format command succeeds and git diff is empty

Step 1: Run the formatter. Fix any issues it cannot auto-fix, then repeat.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Security Audit Weekly
description: Weekly npm audit scan, triage vulnerabilities by severity, and propose or apply safe patches.
description_zh: 每周运行 npm audit，按严重级别分诊漏洞，并提出或应用安全补丁。

steps.name: Run npm audit
steps.prompt: Run npm audit and capture critical, high, and moderate findings.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行 npm audit 并捕获 critical、high 和 moderate 问题。

steps.name: Triage findings
steps.prompt: Group vulnerabilities by severity and exploitability. Flag dev-only vs production exposure.
steps.prompt_zh: 按严重级别和可利用性归类漏洞，标记 dev-only 与生产暴露。

steps.name: Propose fixes
steps.prompt: Recommend npm audit fix, targeted overrides, or dependency bumps. Note breaking changes.
steps.prompt_zh: 推荐 npm audit fix、定向 overrides 或依赖升级，并说明破坏性变更。

exit_condition.description: Weekly security audit summary delivered with remediation plan
exit_condition.description_zh: 每周安全审计摘要和修复计划已交付

kickoff_prompt:
/loop 7d Start the "Security Audit Weekly" loop.

Goal: deliver a weekly npm audit summary with a remediation plan.
Between iterations run: npm audit --json
Exit when: summary is posted with prioritized fixes.

Step 1: Run npm audit, triage by severity, and propose safe remediation steps.
author: loops!

title: Build Until Green
description: Run the production build, fix compile and bundling errors, and loop until the build succeeds.
description_zh: 运行生产构建，修复编译和打包错误，并循环直到构建成功。

steps.name: Run build
steps.prompt: Run the project build command and capture all errors.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行项目构建命令并捕获所有错误。

steps.name: Fix build errors
steps.prompt: Fix compile, type, and bundling errors one at a time. Prefer minimal diffs.
steps.prompt_zh: 逐个修复编译、类型和打包错误，保持改动最小。

steps.name: Re-run build
steps.prompt: Run the build again and confirm errors are resolved.
steps.prompt_zh: 再次运行构建，确认错误已解决。

exit_condition.description: Production build completes with exit code 0
exit_condition.description_zh: 生产构建以退出码 0 完成

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Build Until Green" loop.

Goal: production build succeeds
Max iterations: 10
Between iterations run: npm run build
Exit when: npm run build exits 0

Step 1: Run the build. If it fails, fix the first error, then repeat until green.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: E2E Until Green
description: Run end-to-end tests, fix UI and integration failures, and loop until the E2E suite passes.
description_zh: 运行端到端测试，修复 UI 和集成失败，并循环直到 E2E 套件通过。

steps.name: Run E2E
steps.prompt: Run the project's E2E test command and capture failures.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行项目 E2E 测试命令并捕获失败。

steps.name: Fix failures
steps.prompt: Fix the smallest root cause for failing E2E specs. Prefer stable selectors and realistic waits.
steps.prompt_zh: 为失败的 E2E spec 修复最小根因，优先使用稳定 selector 和真实等待。

steps.name: Re-run E2E
steps.prompt: Re-run E2E until all specs pass.
steps.prompt_zh: 重复运行 E2E，直到所有 spec 通过。

exit_condition.description: E2E suite exits 0
exit_condition.description_zh: E2E 套件退出码为 0

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "E2E Until Green" loop.

Goal: E2E suite passes
Max iterations: 10
Between iterations run: npm run test:e2e
Exit when: E2E command exits 0

Step 1: Run E2E tests. Fix the first failing spec, then repeat.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Spec-First Ship
description: Implement from a written spec.md checklist — each iteration completes one unchecked requirement with verification.
description_zh: 从 spec.md 清单实现，每轮完成一个未勾选需求并验证。

steps.name: Read spec
steps.prompt: Read spec.md. Pick the first unchecked requirement. Do not start multiple requirements in one pass.
steps.prompt_zh: 读取 spec.md，选择第一个未勾选需求；每轮只做一个需求。

steps.name: Implement requirement
steps.prompt: Implement that single requirement with tests. Mark it [x] in spec.md only after verification.
steps.prompt_zh: 实现这个单一需求并添加测试；只有验证后才在 spec.md 标记 [x]。

steps.name: Verify
steps.prompt: Run tests and manual checks listed in the spec for this requirement.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行 spec 中为该需求列出的测试和手动检查。

exit_condition.description: Every requirement in spec.md is checked off
exit_condition.description_zh: spec.md 中每个需求都已勾选

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Spec-First Ship" loop.

Goal: every requirement in spec.md is implemented and checked off
Max iterations: 15
Between iterations run: npm test
Exit when: spec.md has no unchecked requirements

Step 1: Read spec.md, implement the first unchecked item, verify it, mark [x], and stop this iteration.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.

files.content:
# Feature spec

Check off each item only after it is implemented and verified.

## Requirements
- [ ] Requirement 1 — describe acceptance criteria
- [ ] Requirement 2 — describe acceptance criteria

author: loops!

title: Merge Conflict Resolver
description: Rebase or merge target branch, resolve conflicts file by file, and loop until the branch is current and tests pass.
description_zh: rebase 或 merge 目标分支，逐文件解决冲突，并循环直到分支最新且测试通过。

steps.name: Update branch
steps.prompt: Fetch latest main and attempt rebase or merge.
steps.prompt_zh: 拉取最新 main 并尝试 rebase 或 merge。
steps.shell_check: git fetch origin && git rebase origin/main

steps.name: Resolve conflicts
steps.prompt: For each conflict, read both sides, preserve intent, and resolve with minimal changes.
steps.prompt_zh: 逐个冲突读取双方意图，用最小改动保留正确行为。

steps.name: Verify
steps.prompt: Run tests after each resolution batch.
steps.prompt_zh: 每批冲突解决后运行测试。

exit_condition.description: Rebase complete with no conflicts and tests passing
exit_condition.description_zh: Rebase 完成、无冲突，且测试通过

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Merge Conflict Resolver" loop.

Goal: branch is rebased on main with no conflicts and tests pass
Max iterations: 8
Between iterations run: npm test
Exit when: rebase completes and tests exit 0

Step 1: Rebase on main. Resolve conflicts one file at a time, run tests, continue.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!

title: Visual Regression Until Match
description: Run Playwright or Percy visual snapshots on UI changes; fix unintended diffs until baselines match intentionally.
description_zh: 对 UI 改动运行 Playwright 或 Percy 视觉快照，修复非预期差异直到基线匹配。

steps.name: Run visual tests
steps.prompt: Run visual regression tests. List screenshots that differ from baseline with component names.
steps.prompt_zh: 运行视觉回归测试，列出与基线不同的截图和组件名。

steps.name: Fix or approve
steps.prompt: If diffs are bugs, fix CSS/markup. If intentional, update snapshots only after verifying in report.
steps.prompt_zh: 如果差异是 bug，则修 CSS/markup；如果是预期变更，先验证报告再更新快照。

exit_condition.description: Visual regression tests pass with approved baselines
exit_condition.description_zh: 视觉回归测试通过，且基线差异已批准

kickoff_prompt:
Start the "Visual Regression Until Match" loop.

Goal: visual regression suite passes with intentional UI only
Max iterations: 6
Between iterations run: npx playwright test --grep @visual
Exit when: visual tests exit 0

Step 1: Run visual tests. Fix unintended UI diffs; update baselines only for deliberate design changes.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
author: loops!
